title: Monsoon Trails — Idukki
summary: Two days of misty ghat roads, waterfalls in full flow, and hairpins wrapped in cloud. Our signature monsoon run through the Western Ghats — bring your rain gear and your patience for slow, slippery corners.
rsvpNote: Limited to 20 riders. Riding gear (helmet, jacket, boots) mandatory. Confirm on the WhatsApp group by July 25.
priceNote: Contribution: ₹2,500/rider (fuel toll + 1 night stay). Pillion welcome.

title: Tawang Adventure 2026
route: Guwahati → Bomdila → Tawang → BumLa - Zeminthang - Jang - Mago - GokarLa → Tezpur → Guwahati
highlights: Early morning ride back with the group

title: Sundowner Circuit — Blore Edition
summary: An easy half-day loop timed to catch golden hour on the ghat road up Nandi Hills, followed by chai and bench-racing at the top before the ride back under a full moon.
highlights: Early morning ride back with the group

title: Nepal - Mustang 2025
route: Gorakhpur - Kathmandu - Pokhara - Marpha - Jomsom - Mukthinath - Pokhara - Gorakhpur
summary: A thrilling adventure through the rugged landscapes of Nepal and Mustang, exploring ancient monasteries, high-altitude lakes, and breathtaking mountain passes.
highlights: Early morning ride back with the group

title: Ladakh - Zanskar Expedition 2024
route: Chandigarh - Jispa - Padum - Leh - Pangong - Hanle - UmlingLa - Tso Moriri - Nyoma - Leh - Kargil - Srinagar - Chandigarh
highlights: Early morning ride back with the group

title: Spiti Valley Circuit
route: Delhi - Chandigarh - Narkanda - Chitkul - Kalpa -  Tabo - Kaza - Losar - Chandra Taal - Sissu - Chandigarh
summary: A thrilling adventure through the rugged landscapes of Spiti Valley, exploring ancient monasteries, high-altitude lakes, and breathtaking mountain passes.
highlights: Early morning ride back with the group

title: Ladakh Full Circuit 2022
route: Delhi - Ludhiana - Srinagar - Kargil - Leh - Nubra - Hunder - Pangong - Hanle - UmlingLa - Karu - Jispa - Manali - Kasol - Delhi
summary: A comprehensive journey through the stunning landscapes of Ladakh, including visits to ancient monasteries, high-altitude lakes, and picturesque mountain passes.
highlights: Early morning ride back with the group
